arts.ttl: Daizen Maeda Celtic surprise catches Brendan Rodgers out as triple shift sparks 'I've run the legs off him' realisation
arts.sum: The Celtic boss has his top scorer available after the club won an appeal against his two-match suspension

arts.ttl: ‘I truly back us against anybody’ – Trusty confident Celtic can stun Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Auston Trusty 'truly believes' Celtic can beat Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League this Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Midweek Warm-up: Is Bayern Munich about to raid Crystal Palace of another young winger?; Throwing it back to Van Halen; Champions League predictions; Reviewing and MORE!
arts.sum: Crystal Palace starlet Jesse Derry Boy is a target for a number of top Euro clubs, including Bayern Munich, Juventus, PSG and Atletico Madrid. Crystal Palace youngster Jesse Derry is set to leave the club after rejecting a professional contract.

arts.ttl: Rodgers delighted as ‘extraordinary’ Celtic forward cleared for Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is thrilled to have an 'extraordinary' Celtic player available versus Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Celtic will play their first Champions League knockout game since 2013 when they host Bayern Munich on Wednesday, February 12 at Parkhead . Celtic face one of their biggest games of the season this week as Bayern Munich come to town in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Celtic have a player with 'all-round' game as Peter Grant predicts world class future
arts.sum: Rodgers spent big on playmaker Arne Engels and Granty feels the Belgian is an “all-rounder” who has a serious chance of going all the way to the big time in his career. Why Peter Grant says Celtic star Arne Engels can be ‘world class’

arts.ttl: Alan McInally highlights one Bayern Munich 'vulnerability' for Celtic to have a go at in Champions League clash
arts.sum: Celtic’s form heading into Champions League tie vs Bayern Munich Brendan Rodgers ‘ side know tomorrow’s knockout playoff first-leg against Bayern Munich will be a difficult and altogether different challenge but they will surely be ready.

arts.ttl: ‘Bayer Leverkusen are probably our strongest rival’ – Serge Gnabry
arts.sum: Eight points separate leaders Bayern Munich and maiden champions Bayer Leverkusen heading into the 22nd matchday, and Serge Gnabry firmly believes that Xabi Alonso’s side are the Rekordmeister’s main title…

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso relaxed as ever ahead of Bayer Leverkusen - Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Next up in the Bundesliga for Bayern Munich is the all important clash against second-place and reigning league champions Bayer Leverkusen. Despite were both sides currently reside in the Bundesliga table, Alonso is remaining increasingly relaxed ahead of the tie, and is not worried at all that his side will be able to get a result at home over Vincent Kompany’s side.

arts.ttl: “The eight point gap did not come by chance” — Josip Stanišić is confident heading into Bayern Munich’s big clash against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Last season, Bayern Munich headed into the big clash in the Rückrunde with top of the table Bayer Leverkusen knowing a win was a must or else the title was not staying in Munich that year. This season, it is Bayern that have a seemingly insurmountable lead, sitting eight points clear of Die Werkself, who now need to win the game.
